series_metadata.series_title: Public Employer State Agency Rates (PES) Reports
series_metadata.series_description: These records are rate reports and write ups that support the annual calculation of rates for Public Employer State Agency Rates (PES). Included in the reports are payroll and premium information, individual claim costs, and statistical tabulations. "Write ups" is the actual terminology used by the Actuarial Department.

retention_rules.disposition: Microform: Retain the microfiche in the Actuarial Unit for 11 years, and then destroy. ; Electronic: The electronic information is contained in access databases and excel spreadsheets saved on the I drive for 25 years, and then destroy. ; Paper: Retain in the Actuarial Unit for 11 years, and then destroy., Microform: Burn ; Electronic: Delete ; Paper: Shred
